title: payment — authorization policies
description: Four policies, one per owned model. Every ability resolves through spatie/laravel-permission, then narrows by tenant scope. PaymentPolicy customer-side abilities auto-scope to the caller's own payments; admin abilities see tenant-wide. Write on Payment is NEVER allowed via customer HTTP — captures happen server-side via the payment intent lifecycle. Support-tool re-dispatch is admin+support only.

abilities.scope: admin + owner + finance role sees tenant-wide; customer sees own only (auto-scoped by invoice.customer_id)
same as viewAny; customer sees only where invoice.customer_id = auth.user.id
Payment rows are created by PaymentIntent.succeeded transition only — no direct API create. Attempted creates return 403 PAYMENT_MANUAL_CREATE_FORBIDDEN.
payments are IMMUTABLE after create — refunds accumulate via the refund module (which updates amount_refunded_cents), disputes via the dispute lifecycle (which updates amount_disputed_cents)
financial retention; purged by PurgeExpiredPaymentDataJob only
admin + owner + finance only — manual capture flow for authorization-hold payments (POST /payments/{payment}/capture). Requires `payment_manual_capture` entitlement.
same as view; returns the receipt_url provider link
cross-tenant support for ops + support role
customer sees own; admin sees tenant-wide (limited to method summary — no decrypted provider_reference)
customer sees own; admin sees redacted view; support sees redacted view (never decrypted provider_reference or fingerprint)
customer creates own via SetupIntent flow (POST /payment-methods)
customer can flip is_default; admin can flip is_active. Immutable fields (provider, provider_reference, method_type, fingerprint_hash, customer) refused by observer.
customer only — atomic lock-and-swap for is_default flag
customer soft-deletes own via DELETE /payment-methods/{method}; admin can soft-delete any method for the tenant with a reason
cross-tenant support — encrypted fields never decrypted
admin sees tenant-wide; customer sees own in-flight only
customer sees own; admin sees all
customer creates for their own invoices; admin creates for any customer's invoice
customer confirms own (POST /payments/intents/{intent}/confirm) — this is the primary customer action. Admin can confirm on behalf of the customer as a support tool.
customer cancels own; admin cancels tenant-wide
intent state transitions are one-way via observer only — no direct PATCH
cross-tenant support
admin + owner + finance role sees tenant-wide; customer sees own dispute status only (limited fields)
same as viewAny
admin + owner + finance role only — POST /disputes/{dispute}/submit-evidence dispatches SubmitDisputeEvidenceJob
admin + owner + finance role only — concedes without fighting. Creates a refund via the refund module + transitions dispute → charge_refunded.
disputes are opened by provider webhook only — no direct API create
state transitions one-way via observer
cross-tenant support
platform_ops cross-tenant intervention
